task.title: Context slimming real sampling retry
task.goal: Run one real worker sample and one real manager sample with slimmed prompt path; capture real prompt/token evidence; verify trusted broadcast/worker evidence/manager gate do not regress.
must_do: Use credentialed clean workspace to run real LLM sampling for 1 worker and 1 manager sample against group news-simple-live-validation-20260408 (dbf3e236-a4e0-41aa-9401-93a778dbb1cf).
Capture real prompt composition and token totals for both samples.
Verify trusted broadcast does not regress, worker evidence remains collected without advancing, manager-only gate still controls stage advancement.
must_not_do: Do not re-implement context slimming unless real evidence proves regression.
Do not expand scope beyond real sampling retry.
Do not print any secret tokens in logs or outputs.
acceptance: At least one real worker sample executed.
At least one real manager sample executed.
Trusted broadcast / worker evidence / manager-only gate behavior did not regress.
Structured terminal result with evidence paths and log path exists.
task.notes: Return strict JSON only. Include evidence_paths and log_path in summary if possible. Do not echo any tokens.
